title: Samurai Dynasty
description: This mod is inspired by the japanes folklore and samurai. It will add new 3D armors and weapons to the game.
body:
![Epic Samurai's Banner](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/i1uj0agxe82r694kas9pw/Epic-Samurai-s.png?rlkey=ytalttq9tbiyzbg6g4zn28wac&st=qge30jti&dl=1)

![](https://img.shields.io/badge/1.19.2%2C%201.20+-message?style=for-the-badge&label=Minecraft%20Version&labelColor=gray&color=%23ef0954) 
 [![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Forge%20-msg?style=for-the-badge&label=Modloader&color=%23ef0954&cacheSeconds=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.curseforge.com%2Fminecraft%2Fmc-mods%2FCuriosAPI&link=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.curseforge.com%2Fminecraft%2Fmc-mods%2Fgeckolib)](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/)  [![](https://img.shields.io/badge/REQUIRED-message?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&label=Azurelib&labelColor=gray&color=%23ef0954)](https://modrinth.com/mod/azurelib)  [![](https://img.shields.io/badge/REQUIRED-message?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&label=CuriosAPI&labelColor=gray&color=%23ef0954)](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios)

---

## 📦 Installation
### Required:
- [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) (before version 0.0.32)
- [Azurelib](https://modrinth.com/mod/azurelib) (from version 0.0.32)
- [Curios](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios)
- [Patchouli - WIP](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli)
### Highly recommended
- [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)
- [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)
### Compat for
- [Deeper and Darker](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker)
- [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- [Ars Nouveau](https://modrinth.com/mod/ars-nouveau)
- [Aquaculture 2](https://github.com/TeamMetallurgy/Aquaculture)
- [Blood Magic](https://modrinth.com/mod/blood-magic)
- [Eldritch End](https://modrinth.com/mod/eldritch-end)

Note: This mod is not compatible with Optifine!

---

## ⭐️ Features
This mod adds new 3D samurai armor sets and weapons to the game!

Try to survive a world full of dangerous japenese creatures, collect their drops and craft unique samurai weapons and armors.
The mobs are not completed yet, they will be soon!

Some of the weapons can be found by exploring the structures of your world.

Note: This mod is still in progress, so it could crash and contain bugs.
